query: SELECT id, homeTeamName, awayTeamName, homeScore, awayScore, aiSummary IS NOT NULL as hasAiSummary, goalsTimeline IS NOT NULL as hasGoalsTimeline, matchStatistics IS NOT NULL as hasMatchStats, aiPrediction IS NOT NULL as hasAiPrediction FROM games WHERE status = 'finished' LIMIT 10;
